title: SEALAPACK SAP025 Flavour Lock Grill Bags, Plastic
features: CLEAN COOKING: Love the idea of a toasted cheese sandwich or filled panini but not the mess? After cooking, remove the sandwich and simply wash the Sealapack grill bag ready for next use.
HOME & OFFICE USE: Inexpensive option for making a filled, warm toasted sandwich for lunch at home or in the office
RE-USEABLE EASY TO CLEAN: Perfect easy to clean, non-stick bags for healthy clean grilling. Suitable for paninis, fish or meat
ADDED FLAVOUR: Use the grill bag to cook a piece of chicken or fish, add herbs or spices to the bag and grill without adding baked on food to your grill
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: SINGLE RE-USEABLE BAG
description: Love the idea of a toasted cheese sandwich or filled panini but not the mess? After cooking, remove the sandwich and simply wash the Sealapack grill bag ready for next use. Inexpensive option for making a filled, warm toasted sandwich for lunch at home or in the office. Perfect easy to clean, non-stick bags for healthy clean grilling. Suitable for paninis, fish or meat. Use the grill bag to cook a piece of chicken or fish, add herbs or spices to the bag and grill without adding baked on food to your grill. Pack includes a single re-useable bag
